name: Bread Pudding with Bourbon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric mixer, beat the eggs until frothy (about 3 minutes).
2. Add sugar, nutmeg, vanilla, and cinnamon, and beat until well blended.
3. In a saucepan, heat the butter and milk until the butter melts (but do not allow it to boil).
4. In a large bowl, mix together raisins, pecans, and bread cubes.
5. Combine the milk and egg mixtures, pour this over the bread and allow it to soak for 45 minutes.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
7. Lightly grease individual ramekins or a large loaf pan.
8. Add the apple to the bread pudding, and spoon mixture into the baking container.
9. Place in the oven immediately; reduce heat to 300 degrees F (150 degrees C) and bake for 40 minutes.
10. Increase the heat to 425 degrees F (220 degrees C) and bake for another 15 minutes until nicely browned.
11. To make bourbon sauce, combine 2 eggs and icing sugar. Melt butter in a double boiler, whisk in egg mixture, and cook, stirring constantly, until sugar has melted and sauce has thickened slightly.
12. Allow to cool, then add bourbon.
13. Serve over bread pudding.
